title: Reverse Words
description: Given a sentence, reverse the order of the words. Words are separated by single spaces. There is no leading or trailing whitespace in the input.
inputSpec: A single line containing a sentence (1 to 100 characters).
outputSpec: The words of the sentence in reversed order, separated by single spaces.
constraints: 1 ≤ length ≤ 100, only lowercase letters and spaces.
